segment.source: Enhanced Touchscreen Gestures
segment.target: 触摸屏手势增强

segment.source: Authors: Joseph Lee, Kefas Lungu
segment.target: 作者: Joseph Lee

segment.source: This add-on provides additional touchscreen gestures for NVDA. It also provides a set of gestures for easier browse mode navigation.
segment.target: 此插件为 NVDA 提供了更多的触摸屏支持手势。其中包括一组浏览模式导航手势。

segment.source: Note: this add-on requires NVDA 2025.3.3 or later running on a touchscreen computer with Windows 10 or 11.
segment.target: 注意：此插件需在运行 Windows 10 或 11 的触摸屏计算机上使用，且要求 NVDA 版本为 2025.3.3 或更高。

segment.source: Commands
segment.target: 命令

segment.source: Available everywhere
segment.target: 随处可用

segment.source: Two finger tripple tap: quits NVDA!
segment.target: 双指三击：退出 NVDA！

segment.source: Three finger flick right: press Tab.
segment.target: 三指右滑：按 Tab 键。

segment.source: Three finger flick left: press Shift+Tab.
segment.target: 三指左滑：按 Shift+Tab 键。

segment.source: Three finger flick down (object mode): read current window.
segment.target: 三指下滑（对象模式）：朗读当前窗口。

segment.source: Three finger double tap: cycles through speech symbol levels which determine what symbols are spoken.
segment.target: 三指双击：在语音符号级别之间循环切换，已确定朗读哪些符号。

segment.source: Three finger triple tap: toggles screen curtain.
segment.target: 三指三击：切换黑屏。

segment.source: Four finger tap: cycles through audio ducking modes.
segment.target: 四指单击：在音频闪避模式之间切换。

segment.source: Four finger double tap: toggle input help mode.
segment.target: 四指双击：切换输入帮助的开关。

segment.source: Four finger flick left: report object with focus.
segment.target: 四指左滑：读出有焦点的对象。

segment.source: Four finger flick right: report current navigator object.
segment.target: 四指右滑：读出当前导航对象。

segment.source: Four finger flick up: report title of the current window.
segment.target: 四指上滑：读出当前窗口的标题。

segment.source: Four finger flick down: report status bar text.
segment.target: 四指下滑：读出当前应用程序的状态栏。

segment.source: Touch browse mode
segment.target: 触摸浏览模式

segment.source: This touch mode, available in browse mode, allows you to navigate the document by selected element. This mode is entered automatically when browse mode becomes active, including switching to a browse mode document. From this mode, flicking up or down with one finger cycles through available element navigation modes, while flicking right or left with one finger moves to next or previous chosen element, respectively. Once you move away from browse mode documents or switch to focus mode, object touch mode will be used.
segment.target: 此触摸模式在浏览模式下可用，允许您按所选元素导航文档。当浏览模式激活时（包括切换到浏览模式文档），会自动使用此模式。在此模式下，用一根手指向上或向下滑动可循环浏览可用的元素导航模式，向右或向左滑动则可移动到下一个或上一个选定的元素。若您离开浏览模式文档，将使用对象触摸模式。

segment.source: Available touch browse mode elements can vary between NVDA versionns. For NVDA 2025.3.3 and 2026.1, the available elements are default (move through elements/objects regardless of type), headings, tables, links, form fields, lists, frames, graphics, landmarks, embedded objects (dialogs and web apps, for example), and text paragraphs. In NVDA 2026.2, the available elements by default are default, headings, tables, links, form fields, and lists, with additional elements selectable from browse mode NVDA settings category.
segment.target: 可用的触摸浏览模式元素在不同 NVDA 版本中将有所不同。对于 NVDA 2025.3.3 和 2026.1，可用的元素包括默认（在元素/对象中移动，无论类型如何）、标题、表格、链接、表单字段、列表、框架、图形、路标、嵌入式对象（例如对话框和 Web 应用）以及文本段落。在 NVDA 2026.2 中，默认可用的元素包括默认、标题、表格、链接、表单字段和列表，其他元素可从 NVDA 设置中的浏览模式类别中添加。

segment.source: Note: this feature is included in NVDA 2026.2.
segment.target: 注意：此功能已包含在 NVDA 2026.2 中。

segment.source: Synth settings touch mode
segment.target: 语音设置模式

segment.source: You can use this mode to quickly change synthesizer settings such as choosing a voice and changing volume. In this mode, use two finger flick left or right to move between synth settings and use two finger flick up and down gestures to change values. This gestures mirrors that of synth settings ring commands on the keyboard.
segment.target: 您可以在此模式下快速更改语音合成器设置，例如选择语音和调节音量。在此模式下，使用两个手指向左或向右滑动以在合成器设置之间切换，然后使用两个手指向上和向下清扫来更改相应设置的值。该手势对应于键盘上的语音循环切换。

segment.source: For a list of changes made between each add-on releases, refer to [changelogs for add-on releases][1] document.
segment.target: 有关每个插件版本之间所做的更改，请参阅[插件更新日志（英语）][1]文档。

segment.source: [1]: https://github.com/kefaslungu/enhancedTouchGestures/blob/main/changes.md
segment.target: [1]: https://github.com/kefaslungu/enhancedTouchGestures/blob/main/changes.md
